_meta.description: Mneme Ship Design System — Crew Module Catalog. Crew modules are Level-2 components that provide habitable space for crew members.

crew_modules.name: Single-Seat Capsule
crew_modules.notes: Minimal capsule for short missions. Basis: Mercury capsule.

crew_modules.name: Dual-Seat Capsule
crew_modules.notes: Two-person capsule with basic life support. Basis: Gemini, Voskhod.

crew_modules.name: Triple-Seat Capsule
crew_modules.notes: Three-person command module. Basis: Apollo CM, Soyuz descent module.

crew_modules.name: Seven-Seat Crew Capsule
crew_modules.notes: Commercial crew capsule with touchscreen controls. Basis: Crew Dragon, Starliner.

crew_modules.name: Shuttle Crew Cabin
crew_modules.notes: Flight deck + middeck with airlock. Basis: Space Shuttle orbiter crew compartment.

crew_modules.name: Small Habitat Module
crew_modules.notes: Long-duration habitat with exercise equipment. Basis: ISS Zvezda, Zarya.

crew_modules.name: Large Habitat Module
crew_modules.notes: Research laboratory with glovebox and external payload mounts. Basis: ISS Destiny, Columbus.

crew_modules.name: Commercial Passenger Cabin
crew_modules.notes: High-capacity passenger module for commercial spaceflight. Basis: Starship (conceptual), orbital hotels.
